summary: HSD cleanup PR touching SysDolphin baselib TExp and SisLib. The PR reordered early TExp allocation/free helpers, refactored TExpAssignReg conditionals, renamed SisLib allocator/free functions and allocator block fields, updated matching headers/forward declarations, and renamed related symbols. The only loaded validation evidence is an automated report showing HSD_SisLib_Free improved from 92.57% to 99.82%.

key_files.role: Main SisLib cleanup: renamed allocator functions, allocator globals, struct type and fields; replaced callsites; removed stale AI/todo match comments.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Cleanup and rename some SisLib code, remove unnecessary AI comments

key_files.role: Header updates for SisLib type and prototype renames.
Forward declaration updated for renamed SisLib allocator block type.
evidence_refs: diff:forward.h typedef struct sislib_UnkAllocData -> typedef struct SisBlock

key_files.role: Symbol table synchronized with SisLib function and global renames.
TExp cleanup: moved allocation/free helpers earlier and rewrote TExpAssignReg conditionals into clearer nested checks.
evidence_refs: pr_body: TExp adjustments to function order and cleanup of TExpAssignReg
diff:texp.c TExpAssignReg split compound assignment-in-condition checks into explicit val assignment followed by val < 0 checks

what_changed.text: Renamed SisLib allocation functions from address-style names to semantic allocator/free names: HSD_SisLib_803A5798 became HSD_SisLib_Alloc and HSD_SisLib_803A594C became HSD_SisLib_Free.
Renamed the SisLib allocator block struct from sislib_UnkAllocData to SisBlock and changed field names from data_0/data_1 to next/data.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.h struct rename and field rename
diff:sislib.c local declarations and field use replacements

what_changed.text: Renamed two SisLib sbss globals from address-style names to free_head and used_head, and updated source and symbols.txt to use those names.
Removed stale SisLib comments describing previous match percentages, register allocation issues, literal pooling, and AI/todo notes.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c deleted comments before HSD_SisLib_Alloc and HSD_SisLib_Free

what_changed.text: Moved TExp TevAlloc, CnstAlloc, and HSD_TExpFree earlier in texp.c, near HSD_TExpGetType and before ref/unref functions.
evidence_refs: diff:texp.c helper block added near top and deleted from later location
pr_body: TExp adjustments to function order

what_changed.text: Rewrote several TExpAssignReg compound conditionals so AssignColorReg, AssignColorKonst, AssignAlphaReg, and AssignAlphaKonst calls are made in separate statements before checking val < 0.

smart_moves.text: Kept SisLib source, header declarations, forward declarations, and symbols.txt in sync for the same semantic renames.
Used behavior-revealing names for allocator list state: free_head and used_head clearly track the free and allocated SisBlock lists in HSD_SisLib_Alloc/HSD_SisLib_Free.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c free_head and used_head used as list heads
diff:sislib.c traversal via next in allocation/free routines

smart_moves.text: Removed stale generated/AI-style match notes instead of preserving comments that no longer reflected the cleaned source.
TExpAssignReg cleanup preserved existing assert IDs while separating side-effecting assignment calls from boolean conditions, improving readability without evidence of broad behavior changes.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered routine's behavior is clear, semantic renames should be propagated through the implementation, header prototypes, forward declarations, and symbols metadata together.

For allocator-like structs, replacing unknown field names with role names such as next, data, and size can make list manipulation and allocation ownership reviewable when the code repeatedly uses those fields in that role.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c free/used list traversal via next
diff:sislib.c returned allocation pointer uses data

decomp_lessons.lesson: Stale match-score comments and AI-generated notes are cleanup candidates once the source has been renamed and refactored; preserve only current evidence-backed notes.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c deleted match-percentage and AI/todo comments

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: The automated PR report attributes a matching improvement to HSD_SisLib_Free: before 92.57%, after 99.82%, +16 bytes in main/sysdolphin/baselib/sislib.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The report covers HSD_SisLib_Free only; no loaded report claims full function match or validates the rest of the PR.

The raw diff was truncated in the loaded file, but targeted local reads supplied the missing sislib.h and texp.c hunks.
Only one automated validation comment is loaded, and it reports improvement for HSD_SisLib_Free only.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Synchronize semantic renames across source, headers, forward declarations, and symbols
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2641 renamed SisLib allocator/free functions and allocator block names in sislib.c, sislib.h, forward.h, and config/GALE01/symbols.txt together. This is evidence for a reusable cleanup pattern: when a semantic rename is supported, update all declaration and symbol surfaces in the same focused PR.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace unknown allocator field names with role names when use is clear
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2641 changed SisLib allocator block fields from data_0/data_1 to next/data and updated list traversal, allocation, free, and buffer ownership sites consistently. This supports using field role evidence from repeated access patterns to improve names.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c list traversal and allocation uses

source_update_candidates.title: SisLib allocator function renames in PR #2641
source_update_candidates.text: In PR #2641, HSD_SisLib_803A5798 at .text:0x803A5798 was renamed to HSD_SisLib_Alloc, and HSD_SisLib_803A594C at .text:0x803A594C was renamed to HSD_SisLib_Free.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source-owned path fact for curator review; the PR evidence supports the historical rename but intake should not promote it directly.

source_update_candidates.title: SisLib allocator block and list-head names in PR #2641
source_update_candidates.text: In PR #2641, sislib_UnkAllocData was renamed to SisBlock, fields data_0/data_1 were renamed to next/data, and globals at .sbss:0x804D7970/.sbss:0x804D7974 were renamed to free_head/used_head.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact about SisLib allocator naming; curator should decide whether to record it as source-owned knowledge.

source_update_candidates.title: Cleanup stale AI/match-score comments after source improves
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2641 removed stale comments that described old match percentages, register allocation issues, literal pooling, and AI/todo notes while renaming and cleaning SisLib allocator code. This may reinforce a standard that obsolete generated/AI commentary should not remain once cleaner source evidence exists.
source_update_candidates.reason: This overlaps with existing standards about authored source style and evidence-backed notes; curator should decide if an explicit comment-cleanup note is worth adding.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all SisLib or TExp changes matched; the only loaded validation report is for HSD_SisLib_Free improving to 99.82%.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no review comments or reviews were loaded.
Do not treat TExp function order changes as a proven matching tactic beyond this PR without additional objdiff/checkdiff evidence.
Do not promote free_head/used_head as a general global-naming standard; this PR only supports the specific SisLib allocator context.
